title: AI Celebrity Mugshot
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a viral celebrity booking portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a fictional celebrity-style booking portrait with tabloid drama. Preserve the subject's recognizable identity, facial structure, expression, age impression, pose, camera angle, and main framing. Add a luxury outfit, paparazzi flash spill, height-measurement wall, serious expression, cinematic true-crime documentary lighting, realistic skin detail, and sharp photorealistic editorial polish. If a placard appears, keep it generic and unreadable. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, blurry, low resolution, changed identity, distorted face, deformed body, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate features, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, readable text, text overlays, smiling excessively, futuristic background, fantasy elements, pixelated, noise, artifacts, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
